note: Added 5 integration tests for full packet flow through composition engine: (1) full_handshake_between_composition_peers_never_reaches_smoltcp - verifies WG handshake via composition never injects to smoltcp, (2) tcp_syn_flows_encrypted_through_composition_to_peer_smoltcp - verifies TCP SYN arrives encrypted and is decrypted to peer's smoltcp, (3) full_tcp_handshake_and_data_exchange_through_composition - complete TCP handshake + bidirectional data through encrypted tunnel, (4) udp_data_flow_through_composition - bidirectional UDP data flow through encrypted tunnel, (5) timer_keepalive_between_composition_peers - timer-driven keepalive generation between peers. All 380 tests pass.
